code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a mean of transportation into a fluent, single sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper to strip surrounding quotes from literal strings
    def clean(value: str) -> str:
        return value.strip('\"')

    # Mapping from predicate to a fragment generator (subject is handled separately)
    fragment_map = {
        "location": lambda o: f"is located in {clean(o)}",
        "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {clean(o)}",
        "builder": lambda o: f"was built by {clean(o)}",
        "manufacturer": lambda o: f"is manufactured by {clean(o)}",
        "operator": lambda o: f"is operated by {clean(o)}",
        "status": lambda o: f"is {clean(o).lower()}",
        "alternativeName": lambda o: f"is also known as {clean(o)}",
        "bodyStyle": lambda o: f"has a {clean(o).lower()} body style",
        "engine": lambda o: f"is powered by {clean(o)}",
        "relatedMeanOfTransportation": lambda o: f"is related to {clean(o)}",
        "transmission": lambda o: f"features a {clean(o)} transmission",
        "wheelbase": lambda o: f"has a wheelbase of {clean(o)}",
        "completionDate": lambda o: f"was completed on {clean(o)}",
        "length": lambda o: f"is {clean(o)} long",
        "powerType": lambda o: f"uses {clean(o)} power",
        "shipClass": lambda o: f"is a {clean(o).lower()}",
        "shipDisplacement": lambda o: f"displaces {clean(o)} tonnes",
        "shipLaunch": lambda o: f"was launched on {clean(o)}",
        "shipOrdered": lambda o: f"was ordered on {clean(o)}",
        "shipPower": lambda o: f"has power {clean(o)}",
        "topSpeed": lambda o: f"can reach a top speed of {clean(o)}",
        "christeningDate": lambda o: f"was christened on {clean(o)}",
        "maidenVoyage": lambda o: f"made its maiden voyage on {clean(o)}",
        "shipBeam": lambda o: f"has a beam of {clean(o)}",
        "shipInService": lambda o: f"has been in service since {clean(o)}",
        "activeYearsStartDate": lambda o: f"started active service on {clean(o)}",
        "shipLaidDown": lambda o: f"was laid down on {clean(o)}",
        "buildDate": lambda o: f"was built between {clean(o)}",
        "cylinderCount": lambda o: f"has {clean(o)} cylinders",
        "totalProduction": lambda o: f"produced {clean(o)} units",
        "countryOrigin": lambda o: f"originated from {clean(o)}",
        "diameter": lambda o: f"has a diameter of {clean(o)}",
        "failedLaunches": lambda o: f"suffered {clean(o)} failed launch(es)",
        "rocketStages": lambda o: f"has {clean(o)} rocket stage(s)",
        "totalLaunches": lambda o: f"conducted {clean(o)} launch(es)",
        "assembly": lambda o: f"was assembled in {clean(o)}",
        "class": lambda o: f"belongs to the {clean(o).lower()} class",
        "designer": lambda o: f"was designed by {clean(o)}",
        "modelYears": lambda o: f"was produced in model year {clean(o)}",
        "country": lambda o: f"is a country called {clean(o)}",
        "foundationPlace": lambda o: f"was founded in {clean(o)}",
        "foundedBy": lambda o: f"was founded by {clean(o)}",
        "designCompany": lambda o: f"was designed by {clean(o)}",
        "productionStartYear": lambda o: f"started production in {clean(o)}",
        "productionEndYear": lambda o: f"ended production in {clean(o)}",
        "width": lambda o: f"is {clean(o)} metres wide",
        "layout": lambda o: f"has a {clean(o).lower()} layout",
        "parentCompany": lambda o: f"is owned by {clean(o)}",
        "product": lambda o: f"produces {clean(o)}",
        "city": lambda o: f"is based in {clean(o)}",
        "successor": lambda o: f"was succeeded by {clean(o)}",
        "fate": lambda o: f"met the fate of {clean(o)}",
        "keyPerson": lambda o: f"has key person {clean(o)}",
        "subsidiary": lambda o: f"has subsidiary {clean(o)}",
        "comparable": lambda o: f"is comparable to {clean(o)}",
        "finalFlight": lambda o: f"had its final flight on {clean(o)}",
        "function": lambda o: f"serves as {clean(o).lower()}",
        "launchSite": lambda o: f"launches from {clean(o)}",
        "maidenFlight": lambda o: f"first flew on {clean(o)}",
        "capital": lambda o: f"has capital {clean(o)}",
        "demonym": lambda o: f"its people are called {clean(o)}",
        "leader": lambda o: f"is led by {clean(o)}",
        "partialFailures": lambda o: f"experienced {clean(o)} partial failure(s)",
        "site": lambda o: f"is located at {clean(o)}",
        "headquarter": lambda o: f"has its headquarter in {clean(o)}",
        "associatedRocket": lambda o: f"is associated with {clean(o)}",
        "saint": lambda o: f"has patron saint {clean(o)}",
        "employer": lambda o: f"is employed by {clean(o)}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda o: f"has ethnic group {clean(o)}",
        "language": lambda o: f"speaks {clean(o)}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"has leader title {clean(o)}",
        "anthem": lambda o: f"has anthem \"{clean(o)}\"",
        "division": lambda o: f"is a division called {clean(o)}",
        "shipDraft": lambda o: f"has a draft of {clean(o)}",
        "modelStartYear": lambda o: f"started model year in {clean(o)}",
        "areaTotal": lambda o: f"covers an area of {clean(o)}",
        "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {clean(o)}",
        "extinctionDate": lambda o: f"became extinct on {clean(o)}",
    }

    # Assume all triples share the same subject; use the first one as the main subject.
    main_subject = triples[0].subject
    fragments = []
    for t in triples:
        pred = t.predicate
        obj = t.object
        if pred in fragment_map:
            fragment = fragment_map[pred](obj)
        else:
            # fallback: simple "predicate object" phrasing
            fragment = f"{pred} {clean(obj)}"
        fragments.append(fragment)

    # Build a single fluent sentence
    if not fragments:
        return ""
    if len(fragments) == 1:
        sentence = f"{main_subject} {fragments[0]}."
    else:
        # join with commas, last part with "and"
        body = ", ".join(fragments[:-1]) + f", and {fragments[-1]}"
        sentence = f"{main_subject} {body}."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

      if not triples:

      clauses = []
      for t in triples:
          subj = t.subject
          pred = t.predicate
          obj = t.object
  
          # Simple verb mapping for common predicates
          if pred == "location":
              clause = f"{subj} is located in {obj}"
          elif pred == "owner":
              clause = f"{subj} is owned by {obj}"
          elif pred == "builder":
              clause = f"{subj} was built by {obj}"
